# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR changes and why -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New rule (non-breaking)
- [ ] Improvement to an existing rule (semantics unchanged)
- [ ] Breaking change (rule semantics changed)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore / CI

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated (`npm test` green)
- [ ] Lint passes locally (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md` and/or `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] Commit subjects are conventional and ≤72 chars
- [ ] Commits are signed (cryptographic) AND signed-off (DCO)
- [ ] No secrets/tokens committed
